title: Technological
summary: 9609 A Level — innovation, automation, and digital disruption.

simpleExplanation.title: Tech changes everything
simpleExplanation.summary: Automation, e-commerce, AI, and R&D create new products and wipe out old business models.

sections.content: **Technological PESTLE** (6.1.4) is central to **modern case studies**. Balance **opportunity vs obsolescence risk**.
